title: Simple Resource Generators
description: Adds machines to generate ore out of thin air.
body:
# Welcome to Simple Resource Generators

This Mod has been Rebuilt from the ground up and updated to more recent versions of minecraft.

Do you want free resources that just kind of appear. well this mod will give you that... well for a cost. each tier of generator gets more expensive to make but also generate more resources and operate faster.

## Ore Gen's
Automate your ore collection with these so you never need to mine ore again.

### Basic Ore Generator
- Generates loot every 10 seconds
- Drops 1 item
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/basic_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/basic_rare"

### Refined Ore Generator
- Generates loot every 8 seconds
- Drops 2 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/refined_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/refined_rare"
- 
### Blazing Ore Generator
- Generates loot every 6 seconds
- Drops 4 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/blazing_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/blazing_rare"

### Draconic Ore Generator
- Generates loot every 4 seconds
- Drops 6 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/draconic_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/draconic_rare"

### Withered Ore Generator
- Generates loot every 2 seconds
- drops 8 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/withered_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:oregens/withered_rare"


## Fishers
Automate your fishing with these nifty little guys. just make sure to water log them.

### Basic Fisher
- Generates loot every 10 seconds
- Drops 1 item
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/basic_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/basic_rare"

### Refined Fisher
- Generates loot every 8 seconds
- Drops 2 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/refined_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/refined_rare"
- 
### Blazing Fisher
- Generates loot every 6 seconds
- Drops 4 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/blazing_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/blazing_rare"

### Draconic Fisher
- Generates loot every 4 seconds
- Drops 6 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/draconic_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/draconic_rare"

### Withered Fisher
- Generates loot every 2 seconds
- drops 8 items
- Common loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/withered_common"
- Rare loot pool tag: "srgen:fishers/withered_rare"
